rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: Recursive Language Models (2025/12)
results.note: RLM uses Python REPL to recursively sub-call LLMs on chunked input. Recursion exists, but no pairwise 2-to-1 anchor fusion, no log-depth multiplicative compression, no cross-attention referent preservation. Functionally distinct: code-driven sub-calls vs. multiplicative token fusion.

results.title: Autoencoding-Free Context Compression via Contextual Semantic Anchors (2025/10)
results.note: Single-stage anchor compression with anchor-attention into K-V. Candidate explicitly distinguishes itself: RECURSIVE multi-stage vs. SINGLE-STAGE. No log-depth, no 2-to-1 pairwise fusion. Candidate's novelty_claim flags this as prior art that differs.

results.title: Recursive Language Models 2026 paradigm
results.note: Hierarchical recursive task partitioning + LCM summary DAG with lossless pointers. Recursion at task level, not pairwise multiplicative token fusion. Lossless pointers differ from cross-attention referent recovery.

results.title: Tree-Structured Attention with Hierarchical Accumulation (ICLR 2020)
results.note: Parse-tree hierarchical accumulation, 3-stage. Tree structure is close, but candidate's design is BALANCED-BINARY pairwise 2-to-1 with shared fusion function and explicit log-depth multiplicative compression — parse-tree depends on syntactic structure, not balanced halving. Below 0.7 functional threshold.

results.title: AdmTree Adaptive Semantic Trees (2025)
results.note: Hierarchical gist-token summarization, tree-structured. Candidate's novelty_claim explicitly distinguishes: AdmTree is ONE-LEVEL gist tokens summarising independent blocks, not recursive 2-to-1 pairwise log-depth multiplicative cascade. Functionally distinct.

results.title: Context to EDUs Faithful Structured Compression (2026/01)
results.note: EDU-level structured compression with lossless referential pointers. Single-pass discourse-unit compression, no recursive pairwise fusion, no log-depth cascade. Referential integrity via pointers (not via cross-attention to original tokens at every stage).

results.title: Hierarchical Resolution Transformers Wavelet-Inspired (2025/09)
results.note: Wavelet-style multi-resolution log-depth attention. Matches 'log-depth' concept (1 kw) and is closest functional analog (multi-resolution hierarchical). But wavelet decomposition is not pairwise 2-to-1 anchor fusion with shared cross-attention referent preservation; wavelets operate on signals/feature maps via filter banks. Below thresholds.

results.title: CCF Context Compression Framework (2025/09)
results.note: Segment-wise semantic aggregation + KV memory. Candidate's novelty_claim explicitly distinguishes: CCF is single-pass segment-wise, not recursive multi-stage log-depth cascade. Functionally distinct.
